title: Bridge Essay: Spirituality and quality of life in epilepsy and other chronic neurological diso

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Visionary Cosmologies** with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Visionary cosmologies — self-transcendence, mystical experience, numinous, awe, cosmic consciousness.

**Spirituality and quality of life in epilepsy and other chronic neurological disorders.** — Epilepsy Behav. PMID: 30851485. DOI: 10.1016/j.yebeh.2019.01.035. The patients with neurological disorders often report adifferent quality of life (QoL), which is in part explained by clinical-pathological or psychosocial variables. This study evaluated spirituality in patients with chronic brain pathologies, aiming to clarify its specificity and position to amultidimensional model of QoL. Ahundred and ninety-nine adult patients with epilepsy (E) (n = 88), mild cognitive impairment (MCI) (n = 32), ischemic vascular disorders (n = 29), tumors (n = 28), or mu...

notes: Auto-acquired from PubMed/MEDLINE on 2026-07-12. Phase 16 (Visionary Cosmologies). Evaluation: Good (score=2.5)
